hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" . && npm install --silent && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/tsconfig.json" . && node_modules/.bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/dist" --rootDir "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tasks" && cp -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tasks" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/src" && echo "code-flow: deps installed and compiled") || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
